title: Spicy Thai Pasta
description: A fusion of Italian and Thai flavors with a spicy kick. This dish combines juicy meat with the perfect blend of herbs and spices.
instructions: Cook linguine according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the sambal oelek, fish sauce, and chili flakes. Cook for 1-2 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Add the cooked linguine to the skillet and toss to coat with the spicy sauce.
Stir in the chopped green onions and cook for an additional minute.
Season with salt to taste. Serve hot and enjoy!
